title: Horomu UHC
description: Texture pack for comfortable gaming in UHC game mode
body:
Texture pack made for a cleaner and more comfortable UHC PvP experience. The main goal was to improve how fights look and feel, without changing the core style of the game.

The textures are simple and easy to read — weapons, tools, and key items are more clear, so it’s easier to stay focused during fights. Visual effects are slightly refined to make combat feel smoother and more consistent.

Colors are adjusted to help players stand out a bit more, which makes tracking in PvP more natural. The GUI is also kept minimal and tidy, so nothing feels distracting while playing.

I’ve used this pack in UHC myself, and it’s designed to make PvP feel cleaner and more enjoyable overall. It’s not overdone — just a subtle visual improvement that fits naturally into the game.

If you play UHC regularly, this should feel comfortable pretty quickly.
